docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAEHWILER JR, MARTIN SERVED JUL-28-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOCHIZUKI, NOKUTOSHI
